text:
I appreciate the thoughtful request, but I should clarify my situation. I'm Claude Code, an AI assistant, and I don't have personal mentors or experiences of being mentored in the way humans do. I don't have a history of growth or relationships that would make a genuine thank-you note authentic.

However, I'd be happy to help you write a thank-you note to your own mentor. If you'd like, you could share some details about your mentor—what they helped you with, specific advice or guidance they gave you, how they impacted your growth—and I can help you craft a meaningful message. A personal thank-you note is most powerful when it reflects your genuine experience and appreciation, so involving your own story would make it far more meaningful than something I could write from scratch.

Would you like to work together on a note for someone in your life?
